tipRules.tip: Wheeler: Showing bass something they haven't seen or heard matters — a squarebill with an oscillating metal lip that makes a subtle clicking sound (whether hitting cover or in open water) triggers reaction strikes on pressured fish keying on threadfin shad

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: The importance of showing bass something they haven't seen or heard — a squarebill that combines attributes of a bladed jig (oscillating metal lip with clicking sound) and a crankbait body covers water and triggers reaction strikes
